name: Caramel Breakfast Rolls
recipeIngredient: 2 Loaves frozen bread dough (1 lb. each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 1 loaf of dough into small pieces and place them in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
2. In a bowl, combine brown sugar, pudding mix, milk, and butter; stir well to form a smooth mixture.
3. Drizzle half of the brown sugar mixture over the dough pieces in the baking dish.
4. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup nuts and 1/4 cup raisins.
5. Cut the remaining loaf of dough into small pieces and place them on top of the first layer.
6. Drizzle the remaining brown sugar mixture over the dough pieces.
7. Sprinkle with the remaining nuts and raisins.
8. Cover the dish and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
9. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 to 60 minutes.
Yield: 10 to 12 servings.
